_comment: Browser-demo fixture combining VIDEO content + cinematic_fullscreen + lyrics_karaoke. Validates that text overlays (lyrics-scrolling) work on top of video, not just audio — lyrics tick off the video element's currentTime via the same rAF loop. This is the multi-layer composition: scene (none — video is its own backdrop) → content (video, fullscreen) → overlay (lyrics) → chrome (none, hidden by cinematic).
name: Demo — Video Cinematic + Lyrics Overlay
description: Video in cinematic mode with synced LRC lyrics overlaid on top.

content_metadata.lrc_lyrics:
[00:00.50]A flower opens slowly
[00:02.00]Petals catch the light
[00:04.00]Color blooms across the screen
[00:06.00]A small, quiet miracle
[00:08.00]Watched in real time
